hero.name: Sambhav Lamichhane
hero.tagline: I build at the intersection of finance, data, and technology.
hero.subSubline: Senior at University of St. Thomas · Graduating May 2026 · From Kathmandu, Nepal

sections.title: My Story
sections.body: I grew up in Kathmandu, Nepal, with the Himalayas as my backdrop and a family motorcycle dealership as my first business classroom. That ground-level education in how money actually moves shaped everything I've built since. I came to the US for college, won First-Year Class President in my first month knowing no one, and have spent the last three years building at the intersection of markets and technology — from algorithmic trading research to co-founding a fintech platform for unbanked workers to managing a fleet of 100+ VR headsets. I've bungee jumped off a 750-foot bridge in Nepal and walked an 80-year-old through sending her first email. Both were equally rewarding.

bullets: First international student elected Class President at UST
$6,000 won across business competitions with Ruta'al
75+ backtests built as Quantitative Trading Researcher

stats.label: International student Class President at UST

journey.title: Kathmandu Roots
journey.impact: Built a foundation of scrappy problem-solving and high agency in the 'Himalayan classroom'.
journey.lesson: Ambiguity is an opportunity to build from scratch.

journey.title: Family Dealership
journey.impact: Ground-level education in financial operations at a Bajaj motorcycle showroom; reduced discrepancies by 15% through enhanced controls.
journey.lesson: Understanding the customer at the ground level is the only way to build systemic solutions.

journey.title: Yardstick Election
journey.impact: Navigated extreme ambiguity in a new country to win 1,600+ constituents via a high-touch grassroots 'GTM' strategy.
journey.lesson: Trust is built through one-on-one engagement, not just broad signals.

journey.title: VR Lab
journey.impact: Translating qualitative user research from 250+ students into a strategic technology roadmap for campus-wide adoption.
journey.lesson: Hardware is a bottleneck; software onboarding must be frictionless to scale.

journey.title: London Digital Literacy
journey.impact: Identified systemic gaps in literacy; designed and shipped permanent, scalable instructional frameworks for 75+ users to ensure lasting impact.
journey.lesson: A solution isn't successful unless it works when you aren't there.

journey.title: Quant Research
journey.impact: Applied hypothesis-driven experimentation across 75+ backtests, establishing a scalable API framework that drove a 12% portfolio return.
journey.lesson: Data rigor validates intuition; automation scales it.

journey.title: LEAF Lab
journey.impact: Managing product backlogs and sprint planning for AI-powered features; synthesizing insights into prioritized roadmaps aligned with business OKRs.
journey.lesson: Agile success is about clear acceptance criteria and cross-functional alignment.

journey.title: Ruta'al
journey.impact: Co-founded a USSD fintech for unbanked workers; secured $6,000 in seed funding by demonstrating product-market fit across two emerging markets.
journey.lesson: Solve for 'Zero Trust' before you solve for the technology.

projects.name: Ruta'al — Financial Inclusion Platform
projects.description: Co-founded a USSD-based fintech platform serving unbanked informal workers in Mexico and Nepal. Built the functional prototype, conducted TAM/SAM/SOM analysis, led investor pitches, and won $6,000 across business competitions.

projects.name: VibeTicker — Market Sentiment Dashboard
projects.description: Real-time dashboard comparing AI-analyzed financial news sentiment with live equity, ETF, and crypto price data. Built with TypeScript and server-side API integration using Gemini.

projects.name: CardSense — AI Credit Card Optimizer
projects.description: Full-stack web app built with React, Cursor, and Gemini API. Analyzes transaction data to identify optimal card rewards and calculate annual opportunity costs across 15+ products. Deployed on Vercel.

contact.headline: Open to roles in product, fintech, and AI. Graduating May 2026.
